description: Topic-scoped Crossref ingest list for scripts/ingest_crossref_topic.py. Unlike the journal-scoped ingest_crossref_tf/tox scripts, this finds articles by clinical topic regardless of publishing journal — filling gaps where iconic vet topics (lily toxicosis, canine pyometra) live in journals outside the curated T&F / tox whitelists.

topics.query: canine diabetic ketoacidosis insulin fluid therapy
equine colic medical management decision making
ethylene glycol toxicity dog fomepizole ethanol
canine acute pancreatitis cPL diagnosis fluid therapy analgesia
canine cognitive dysfunction syndrome selegiline dementia
canine cranial cruciate ligament rupture TPLO TTA outcome
small animal antimicrobial stewardship resistance ISCAID
NSAID toxicity dog cat ibuprofen meloxicam decontamination
